case_title: DORAIN HARRIS VS. WESTERN DENTAL SERVICES, INC DBA WESTERN DENTAL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-09-2022 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUL-21-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF AMENDING CLAIM TO CORRECT HER FIRST NAME FROM DORAIN TO DORIAN FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRIS, DORIAN
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,999.00 **AMENDED TO CORRECT PLAINTIFF'S NAME** FILED BY HARRIS, DORIAN AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL SERVICES, INC DBA WESTERN DENTAL
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-09-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-24-2022 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: NATIONAL REGISTERED AGENT INC) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRIS, DORIAN AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL SERVICES, INC DBA WESTERN DENTAL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,999.00 FILED BY HARRIS, DORIAN AS TO DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL SERVICES, INC DBA WESTERN DENTAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF DORAIN HARRIS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WESTERN DENTAL SERVICES, INC DBA WESTERN DENTAL REPRESENTED BY JOSEPHINE ENCARNACION, MANAGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES PROOF OF SERVICE. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER OF DIMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
